name: onecommand
description: Build complete, production-ready software systems from a single prompt. Orchestrates Claude and Codex across 8 phases: Spec, Frontend, Backend, Integration, Tests, Automations, Exceed-Expectations, and Self-Improvement.

models.strategy: Opus for analysis, Sonnet for building — best quality + token efficiency

interface.shortDescription: Build complete, deployable software from one prompt
interface.longDescription: OneCommand takes a single natural-language prompt and delivers a complete, production-ready software system. 8 phases: Spec analysis, parallel Frontend+Backend generation, Integration, Tests with self-healing, Automations (CI/CD, git hooks), Exceed-Expectations (dark mode, PWA, security audit), Self-Improvement (memory), and Delivery report.
interface.defaultPrompt: Build a complete software system from my description
